title: GitHub - dhanraj176/agentwatch: See what your AI agents are doing — and catch when they leak your data
excerpt: See what your AI agents are doing — and catch when they leak your data - dhanraj176/agentwatch
content_html:
See what your AI agents are actually doing — and catch when they leak your data.

AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, and anything else using MCP) can read files, fetch web pages, and call tools with your real credentials. The problem: an agent blindly trusts whatever it reads. A poisoned web page or document can quietly instruct it to send your data somewhere it shouldn't — and today, nobody can see it happen.

AgentWatch is a local tool that sits between your agent and its MCP servers, shows every tool call on a live dashboard, and flags when untrusted data flows out to an external destination — explaining each risk in plain English.

What it does

  • Watches every tool call your agent makes, live, in your browser — no more black box.
  • Detects data leaks. Tracks data from where it's read (an untrusted source like a web page) to where it goes (an outbound call), and flags the flow when untrusted content leaves your machine.
  • Explains findings in plain English. Not raw JSON — a sentence anyone can read: "Data leak: your agent fetched content from an external source, then sent it to an external server. Untrusted web content left your machine."
  • Never breaks your setup. It forwards every byte unchanged and only observes — it can't corrupt your agent's traffic.
  • One line to install, one line to wire in. No account, no cloud, fully local.

Quick start

Install:

git clone https://github.com/dhanraj176/agentwatch.git
cd agentwatch
pip install -e ".[dashboard]"

(PyPI package coming soon — for now, install from source.)

Wrap whatever command launches your MCP server — everything after -- is your original command, run and relayed unchanged:

agentwatch run -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /some/dir

Then open the dashboard:

agentwatch dashboard

Visit http://localhost:8787 and watch your agent's activity stream in live.

Wiring it into a client (e.g. Claude Code)

In your MCP config, replace the server command with the same command wrapped by agentwatch run --:

Your client talks to AgentWatch exactly as it would to the real server — it doesn't notice AgentWatch is there.

Try the demo (60 seconds)

See AgentWatch catch a leak without wiring up a real agent. demo_server.py is a mock MCP server with a fetch tool and an upload tool, and run_demo.py drives it: it fetches text, then passes that text straight into an outbound call — the exact flow AgentWatch flags.

Start the dashboard, open http://localhost:8787, then run the demo:

agentwatch dashboard
python run_demo.py

The verdict banner flips red and the upload call is flagged with a plain-English explanation. Everything is local and synthetic — no network, no credentials.

How it works

MCP client  <--stdio-->  agentwatch  <--stdio-->  real MCP server
                             |
                             v
                       agentwatch.db  ──▶  live dashboard

AgentWatch spawns the real server as a subprocess and relays raw bytes between the client and server. For every JSON-RPC message it parses a copy and records it — the forwarded bytes are never re-serialised, so the traffic is byte-for-byte identical to a direct connection.

The leak detection works by taint tracking: when a result comes back from an untrusted source (a web fetch), AgentWatch remembers that data. When a later outbound call (an upload, a POST, a message send) contains that same data in its arguments, the flow is flagged as a risk. Outbound calls carrying unrelated data are left alone — so it flags real leaks, not every network call.

Dashboard

The dashboard shows, live:

  • A verdict banner — green when safe, red the moment a risky flow is detected.
  • Summary stats — total events, tool calls, files touched, and data leaks.
  • Every tool call, with a risk indicator (safe / write / leak) and a plain-English explanation on risky rows.
  • Search and filters (all / risky only / writes only), with protocol handshake noise collapsed by default.

What gets logged

Everything is stored in a local SQLite file (agentwatch.db). A sessions table (one row per run) and a messages table (one row per JSON-RPC message, with timestamp, direction, method, tool name, arguments, result, and the exact raw line). Inspect it with any SQLite tool.

Development

pip install -e ".[dev]"
pytest

Notes

  • Windows: launching .cmd shims like npx by bare name may fail — use cmd /c npx ... or point at the underlying executable.
  • Fully local. No data leaves your machine; AgentWatch makes no network calls of its own.

Limitations

Being upfront about what v0.1 can and can't do:

  • Detection is matching-based. AgentWatch flags an outbound call when it carries data that arrived from an untrusted source. If the model transforms that data first — base64-encodes it, summarizes it, rewords it — the match fails and the flow goes undetected. This is the known gap; smarter detection is on the roadmap.
  • Observe-only. Risky flows are flagged, not blocked. Enforcement mode is the next milestone.
  • stdio transport only. HTTP/SSE MCP servers aren't supported yet.
  • Classification is heuristic. Which tools count as untrusted sources and outbound sinks is currently built-in, not configurable — expect false negatives on unusual tool setups.

Roadmap

  • Enforcement mode — block risky flows, not just detect them (the firewall).
  • Configurable taint sources and sinks.
  • Support for more MCP transports beyond stdio.

License

MIT

blocks.html_en: See what your AI agents are actually doing — and catch when they leak your data.

sentences.en: See what your AI agents are actually doing — and catch when they leak your data.
sentences.zh: 查看您的人工智能代理实际上在做什么，并在他们泄露您的数据时进行捕获。

blocks.html_en: AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, and anything else using MCP) can read files, fetch web pages, and call tools with your real credentials. The problem: an agent blindly trusts whatever it reads. A poisoned web page or document can quietly instruct it to send your data somewhere it shouldn't — and today, nobody can see it happen.

sentences.en: AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, and anything else using MCP) can read files, fetch web pages, and call tools with your real credentials.
sentences.zh: AI 代理（Claude Code、Cursor 以及使用 MCP 的其他任何东西）可以读取文件、获取网页并使用您的真实凭据调用工具。

sentences.en: The problem: an agent blindly trusts whatever it reads.
sentences.zh: 问题是：代理盲目地相信它所读到的任何内容。

sentences.en: A poisoned web page or document can quietly instruct it to send your data somewhere it shouldn't — and today, nobody can see it happen.
sentences.zh: 中毒的网页或文档可以悄悄地指示它将您的数据发送到不应该发送的地方 - 而今天，没有人能看到它发生。

blocks.html_en: AgentWatch is a local tool that sits between your agent and its MCP servers, shows every tool call on a live dashboard, and flags when untrusted data flows out to an external destination — explaining each risk in plain English.

sentences.en: AgentWatch is a local tool that sits between your agent and its MCP servers, shows every tool call on a live dashboard, and flags when untrusted data flows out to an external destination — explaining each risk in plain English.
sentences.zh: AgentWatch 是一个本地工具，位于您的代理及其 MCP 服务器之间，在实时仪表板上显示每个工具调用，并在不受信任的数据流出到外部目的地时进行标记 - 用简单的英语解释每个风险。

blocks.html_en: What it does

sentences.en: What it does
sentences.zh: 它的作用

blocks.html_en: • Watches every tool call your agent makes, live, in your browser — no more black box.

sentences.en: Watches every tool call your agent makes, live, in your browser — no more black box.
sentences.zh: 在浏览器中实时观察您的代理进行的每个工具调用 - 不再有黑匣子。

blocks.html_en: • Detects data leaks. Tracks data from where it's read (an untrusted source like a web page) to where it goes (an outbound call), and flags the flow when untrusted content leaves your machine.

sentences.en: Detects data leaks.
sentences.zh: 检测数据泄漏。

sentences.en: Tracks data from where it's read (an untrusted source like a web page) to where it goes (an outbound call), and flags the flow when untrusted content leaves your machine.
sentences.zh: 跟踪数据从读取位置（不受信任的来源，如网页）到其到达位置（出站呼叫）的过程，并在不受信任的内容离开您的计算机时标记流。

blocks.html_en: • Explains findings in plain English. Not raw JSON — a sentence anyone can read: "Data leak: your agent fetched content from an external source, then sent it to an external server. Untrusted web content left your machine."

sentences.en: Explains findings in plain English.
sentences.zh: 用简单的英语解释调查结果。

sentences.en: Not raw JSON — a sentence anyone can read: "Data leak: your agent fetched content from an external source, then sent it to an external server.
sentences.zh: 不是原始 JSON — 这是任何人都可以读懂的一句话：“数据泄漏：您的代理从外部源获取内容，然后将其发送到外部服务器。

sentences.en: Untrusted web content left your machine."
sentences.zh: 不受信任的网络内容离开了您的机器。”

blocks.html_en: • Never breaks your setup. It forwards every byte unchanged and only observes — it can't corrupt your agent's traffic.

sentences.en: Never breaks your setup.
sentences.zh: 永远不会破坏您的设置。

sentences.en: It forwards every byte unchanged and only observes — it can't corrupt your agent's traffic.
sentences.zh: 它转发每个字节不变，并且只观察 - 它不会破坏代理的流量。

blocks.html_en: • One line to install, one line to wire in. No account, no cloud, fully local.

sentences.en: One line to install, one line to wire in.
sentences.zh: 一根线安装，一根线接线。

sentences.en: No account, no cloud, fully local.
sentences.zh: 没有帐户，没有云，完全本地化。

sentences.en: See AgentWatch catch a leak without wiring up a real agent.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 AgentWatch 在不连接真实代理的情况下捕获泄漏。

sentences.en: demo_server.py is a mock MCP server with a fetch tool and an upload tool, and run_demo.py drives it: it fetches text, then passes that text straight into an outbound call — the exact flow AgentWatch flags.
sentences.zh: demo_server.py 是一个模拟 MCP 服务器，带有获取工具和上传工具，run_demo.py 驱动它：它获取文本，然后将该文本直接传递到出站调用中 — 正是 AgentWatch 标记的流程。

sentences.en: Start the dashboard, open http://localhost:8787, then run the demo:

blocks.html_en: The verdict banner flips red and the upload call is flagged with a plain-English explanation. Everything is local and synthetic — no network, no credentials.

sentences.en: The verdict banner flips red and the upload call is flagged with a plain-English explanation.
sentences.zh: 判决横幅变成红色，并且上传调用带有简单的英语解释。

sentences.en: Everything is local and synthetic — no network, no credentials.
sentences.zh: 一切都是本地的、合成的——没有网络，没有凭证。

blocks.html_en: How it works

sentences.en: How it works
sentences.zh: 它是如何运作的

blocks.html_en: AgentWatch spawns the real server as a subprocess and relays raw bytes between the client and server. For every JSON-RPC message it parses a copy and records it — the forwarded bytes are never re-serialised, so the traffic is byte-for-byte identical to a direct connection.

sentences.en: AgentWatch spawns the real server as a subprocess and relays raw bytes between the client and server.
sentences.zh: AgentWatch 将真实服务器作为子进程生成，并在客户端和服务器之间中继原始字节。

sentences.en: For every JSON-RPC message it parses a copy and records it — the forwarded bytes are never re-serialised, so the traffic is byte-for-byte identical to a direct connection.
sentences.zh: 对于每个 JSON-RPC 消息，它都会解析一个副本并记录它 - 转发的字节永远不会重新序列化，因此流量与直接连接逐字节相同。

blocks.html_en: The leak detection works by taint tracking: when a result comes back from an untrusted source (a web fetch), AgentWatch remembers that data. When a later outbound call (an upload, a POST, a message send) contains that same data in its arguments, the flow is flagged as a risk. Outbound calls carrying unrelated data are left alone — so it flags real leaks, not every network call.

sentences.en: The leak detection works by taint tracking: when a result comes back from an untrusted source (a web fetch), AgentWatch remembers that data.
sentences.zh: 泄漏检测通过污点跟踪进行：当结果从不受信任的来源（网络获取）返回时，AgentWatch 会记住该数据。

sentences.en: When a later outbound call (an upload, a POST, a message send) contains that same data in its arguments, the flow is flagged as a risk.
sentences.zh: 当稍后的出站调用（上传、POST、消息发送）在其参数中包含相同的数据时，该流将被标记为风险。

sentences.en: Outbound calls carrying unrelated data are left alone — so it flags real leaks, not every network call.
sentences.zh: 携带不相关数据的出站呼叫不会被处理，因此它会标记真正的泄漏，而不是每个网络呼叫。

blocks.html_en: • Search and filters (all / risky only / writes only), with protocol handshake noise collapsed by default.

blocks.html_en: What gets logged

sentences.en: What gets logged
sentences.zh: 记录什么

blocks.html_en: Everything is stored in a local SQLite file (agentwatch.db). A sessions table (one row per run) and a messages table (one row per JSON-RPC message, with timestamp, direction, method, tool name, arguments, result, and the exact raw line). Inspect it with any SQLite tool.

sentences.en: Everything is stored in a local SQLite file (agentwatch.db).
sentences.zh: 所有内容都存储在本地 SQLite 文件 (agentwatch.db) 中。

sentences.en: A sessions table (one row per run) and a messages table (one row per JSON-RPC message, with timestamp, direction, method, tool name, arguments, result, and the exact raw line).
sentences.zh: 会话表（每次运行一行）和消息表（每个 JSON-RPC 消息一行，包含时间戳、方向、方法、工具名称、参数、结果和确切的原始行）。

sentences.en: Inspect it with any SQLite tool.
sentences.zh: 使用任何 SQLite 工具检查它。

sentences.en: Development

blocks.html_en: Notes
• Windows: launching .cmd shims like npx by bare name may fail — use cmd /c npx ... or point at the underlying executable.

sentences.zh: 或指向底层可执行文件。

sentences.en: Fully local.
sentences.zh: 完全本地化。

sentences.en: No data leaves your machine; AgentWatch makes no network calls of its own.
sentences.zh: 没有数据离开您的机器； AgentWatch 本身不进行网络调用。

blocks.html_en: Limitations

sentences.en: Limitations
sentences.zh: 局限性

blocks.html_en: Being upfront about what v0.1 can and can't do:

sentences.en: Being upfront about what v0.1 can and can't do:
sentences.zh: 提前说明 v0.1 可以做什么和不能做什么：

blocks.html_en: • Detection is matching-based. AgentWatch flags an outbound call when it carries data that arrived from an untrusted source. If the model transforms that data first — base64-encodes it, summarizes it, rewords it — the match fails and the flow goes undetected. This is the known gap; smarter detection is on the roadmap.

sentences.en: Detection is matching-based.
sentences.zh: 检测是基于匹配的。

sentences.en: AgentWatch flags an outbound call when it carries data that arrived from an untrusted source.
sentences.zh: 当出站呼叫携带来自不受信任来源的数据时，AgentWatch 会标记出站呼叫。

sentences.en: If the model transforms that data first — base64-encodes it, summarizes it, rewords it — the match fails and the flow goes undetected.
sentences.zh: 如果模型首先转换该数据（对其进行 base64 编码、对其进行汇总、重新措辞），则匹配失败并且流不会被检测到。

sentences.en: This is the known gap; smarter detection is on the roadmap.
sentences.zh: 这是已知的差距；更智能的检测已在路线图上。

blocks.html_en: • Observe-only. Risky flows are flagged, not blocked. Enforcement mode is the next milestone.

sentences.en: Observe-only.
sentences.zh: 仅供观察。

sentences.en: Risky flows are flagged, not blocked.
sentences.zh: 有风险的流量会被标记，而不是被阻止。

sentences.en: Enforcement mode is the next milestone.
sentences.zh: 执行模式是下一个里程碑。

blocks.html_en: • stdio transport only. HTTP/SSE MCP servers aren't supported yet.

sentences.en: stdio transport only.
sentences.zh: 仅 stdio 传输。

sentences.en: HTTP/SSE MCP servers aren't supported yet.
sentences.zh: 尚不支持 HTTP/SSE MCP 服务器。

blocks.html_en: • Classification is heuristic. Which tools count as untrusted sources and outbound sinks is currently built-in, not configurable — expect false negatives on unusual tool setups.

sentences.en: Classification is heuristic.
sentences.zh: 分类是启发式的。

sentences.en: Which tools count as untrusted sources and outbound sinks is currently built-in, not configurable — expect false negatives on unusual tool setups.
sentences.zh: 哪些工具被视为不受信任的来源和出站接收器当前是内置的，不可配置 - 预计异常工具设置会出现误报。

blocks.html_en: • Enforcement mode — block risky flows, not just detect them (the firewall).

sentences.en: Enforcement mode — block risky flows, not just detect them (the firewall).
sentences.zh: 强制模式——阻止有风险的流量，而不仅仅是检测它们（防火墙）。

sentences.en: Configurable taint sources and sinks.

blocks.html_en: MIT

content_html_zh:
查看您的人工智能代理实际上在做什么，并在他们泄露您的数据时进行捕获。

AI 代理（Claude Code、Cursor 以及使用 MCP 的其他任何东西）可以读取文件、获取网页并使用您的真实凭据调用工具。 问题是：代理盲目地相信它所读到的任何内容。 中毒的网页或文档可以悄悄地指示它将您的数据发送到不应该发送的地方 - 而今天，没有人能看到它发生。

AgentWatch 是一个本地工具，位于您的代理及其 MCP 服务器之间，在实时仪表板上显示每个工具调用，并在不受信任的数据流出到外部目的地时进行标记 - 用简单的英语解释每个风险。

它的作用

  • 在浏览器中实时观察您的代理进行的每个工具调用 - 不再有黑匣子。
  • 检测数据泄漏。 跟踪数据从读取位置（不受信任的来源，如网页）到其到达位置（出站呼叫）的过程，并在不受信任的内容离开您的计算机时标记流。
  • 用简单的英语解释调查结果。 不是原始 JSON — 这是任何人都可以读懂的一句话：“数据泄漏：您的代理从外部源获取内容，然后将其发送到外部服务器。 不受信任的网络内容离开了您的机器。”
  • 永远不会破坏您的设置。 它转发每个字节不变，并且只观察 - 它不会破坏代理的流量。
  • 一根线安装，一根线接线。 没有帐户，没有云，完全本地化。

快速启动

安装：

git clone https://github.com/dhanraj176/agentwatch.git
cd agentwatch
pip install -e ".[dashboard]"

（PyPI 包即将推出 - 目前，从源代码安装。）

包装启动您的 MCP 服务器的任何命令 - 之后的所有内容 - 都是您的原始命令，运行并转发不变：

agentwatch run -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /some/dir

然后打开仪表板：

agentwatch dashboard

访问 http://localhost:8787 并实时观看代理的活动流。

将其连接到客户端（例如 Claude Code）

在 MCP 配置中，将服务器命令替换为由 agentwatch run -- 包装的相同命令：

您的客户端与 AgentWatch 的对话与与真实服务器的对话完全一样 — 它不会注意到 AgentWatch 的存在。

尝试演示（60 秒）

请参阅 AgentWatch 在不连接真实代理的情况下捕获泄漏。 demo_server.py 是一个模拟 MCP 服务器，带有获取工具和上传工具，run_demo.py 驱动它：它获取文本，然后将该文本直接传递到出站调用中 — 正是 AgentWatch 标记的流程。

启动仪表板，打开 http://localhost:8787，然后运行演示：

agentwatch dashboard
python run_demo.py

判决横幅变成红色，并且上传调用带有简单的英语解释。 一切都是本地的、合成的——没有网络，没有凭证。

它是如何运作的

MCP client  <--stdio-->  agentwatch  <--stdio-->  real MCP server
                             |
                             v
                       agentwatch.db  ──▶  live dashboard

AgentWatch 将真实服务器作为子进程生成，并在客户端和服务器之间中继原始字节。 对于每个 JSON-RPC 消息，它都会解析一个副本并记录它 - 转发的字节永远不会重新序列化，因此流量与直接连接逐字节相同。

泄漏检测通过污点跟踪进行：当结果从不受信任的来源（网络获取）返回时，AgentWatch 会记住该数据。 当稍后的出站调用（上传、POST、消息发送）在其参数中包含相同的数据时，该流将被标记为风险。 携带不相关数据的出站呼叫不会被处理，因此它会标记真正的泄漏，而不是每个网络呼叫。

仪表板

仪表板实时显示：

  • 判决横幅 - 安全时为绿色，检测到危险流量时为红色。
  • 摘要统计数据 - 总事件、工具调用、接触的文件和数据泄漏。
  • 每个工具调用都带有风险指示器（安全/写入/泄漏）和有关风险行的简单英语解释。
  • 搜索和过滤器（全部/仅有风险/仅写入），默认情况下协议握手噪声已消失。

记录什么

所有内容都存储在本地 SQLite 文件 (agentwatch.db) 中。 会话表（每次运行一行）和消息表（每个 JSON-RPC 消息一行，包含时间戳、方向、方法、工具名称、参数、结果和确切的原始行）。 使用任何 SQLite 工具检查它。

发展

pip install -e ".[dev]"
pytest

Notes

  • Windows：通过裸名称启动 .cmd 垫片（例如 npx）可能会失败 - 使用 cmd /c npx ... 或指向底层可执行文件。
  • 完全本地化。 没有数据离开您的机器； AgentWatch 本身不进行网络调用。

局限性

提前说明 v0.1 可以做什么和不能做什么：

  • 检测是基于匹配的。 当出站呼叫携带来自不受信任来源的数据时，AgentWatch 会标记出站呼叫。 如果模型首先转换该数据（对其进行 base64 编码、对其进行汇总、重新措辞），则匹配失败并且流不会被检测到。 这是已知的差距；更智能的检测已在路线图上。
  • 仅供观察。 有风险的流量会被标记，而不是被阻止。 执行模式是下一个里程碑。
  • 仅 stdio 传输。 尚不支持 HTTP/SSE MCP 服务器。
  • 分类是启发式的。 哪些工具被视为不受信任的来源和出站接收器当前是内置的，不可配置 - 预计异常工具设置会出现误报。

路线图

  • 强制模式——阻止有风险的流量，而不仅仅是检测它们（防火墙）。
  • 可配置的污点源和污点。
  • 支持 stdio 之外的更多 MCP 传输。

执照

MIT
